objective: Prove the pure automatic harness path where gate-generator captures the baseline before coding and gate-close validates measured changed files without any manual baseline seeding.
blocking_rule: If any touched path outside the current run directory is already dirty before baseline capture, stop and write BLOCKED instead of guessing.
in_scope: Use only the sprint-005 run directory as the touched path.
Run gate-generator before editing generator and evaluator artifacts.
Close the run with measured changed-file enforcement active.
out_of_scope: Any harness changes outside the sprint-005 run directory.

acceptance_criteria.statement: gate-generator captures the baseline automatically for sprint-005.
Only measured post-baseline changes are reported in the generator report.
sprint-005 passes gate-close without manual baseline seeding.

evaluator_checks: The run uses only its own artifact directory as touched scope.
Generator changed files match measured post-baseline changes.
